violations.text: Foods in prep unit were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit, ambient of unit was 47 degrees Fahrenheit at onset of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Lids were observed completely removed on sandwich tabletop. PIC informed to maintain lids closed when possible to enable temperature maintenance. Ambient of unit went down to 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2026

The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other approved method. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2026

Various beverages in 1 door cooler were observed held at 49-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection. Unit was taken out of service to hold TCS foods. Unit must maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Thermometer is lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2025
Gaskets at 2 door reach-in observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the prep table area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
